name: F2 furnace breakdown
description: Primary disruption scenario. F2 furnace fails for 5 days. 6 orders (3,100 sets) physically blocked at F2. 5 orders (7,000 sets) queued at F1 with no downstream path. F1 backup furnace: 130 spare sets/day × 5 days = 650 sets — covers 21% of blocked volume. Core triage tension: ORD-2607 (Lakeland, CAD 24/set) vs ORD-2601 (Lakeland, CAD 112/set). Combined Lakeland relationship: CAD 442,200 in current book.

name: EN45 steel price spike
description: EN45 spring steel price increases 25%. Tests margin erosion analysis and cost-contribution reasoning across the full order book.

name: Rush government order
description: Rush government order for 3,500 sets in 3 weeks. Tests opportunity cost analysis and capacity allocation against existing order book.
